'''dachuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:deactivation|deactivation]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deactivation|deactivation]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dachuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæchiyith|dæchiyith]] || [[word:dæchiyij|dæchiyij]] || [[word:dæchiyish|dæchiyish]] || [[word:dæchiyi|dæchiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dachuchuyuth|dachuchuyuth]] || [[word:dachuchuyuj|dachuchuyuj]] || [[word:dachuchuyush|dachuchuyush]] || [[word:dachuchuyu|dachuchuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dachuyuth|dachuyuth]] || [[word:dachuyuj|dachuyuj]] || [[word:dachuyush|dachuyush]] || [[word:dachuyu|dachuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dachufyuth|dachufyuth]] || [[word:dachufyuj|dachufyuj]] || [[word:dachufyush|dachufyush]] || [[word:dachufyuf|dachufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dachuyuthu|dachuyuthu]] || [[word:dachuyuju|dachuyuju]] || [[word:dachuyushu|dachuyushu]] || [[word:dachuyuku|dachuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dachuyuth|dachuyuth]] || [[word:dachuyuj|dachuyuj]] || [[word:dachuyush|dachuyush]] || [[word:dachuyu|dachuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dachuyuthul|dachuyuthul]] || [[word:dachuyujul|dachuyujul]] || [[word:dachuyushul|dachuyushul]] || [[word:dachuyukul|dachuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dachuyuthuthu|dachuyuthuthu]] || [[word:dachuyujuju|dachuyujuju]] || [[word:dachuyushushu|dachuyushushu]] || [[word:dachuyuku|dachuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dachuyuthun|dachuyuthun]] || [[word:dachuyujun|dachuyujun]] || [[word:dachuyushun|dachuyushun]] || [[word:dachuyukun|dachuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dachuyuthuoro|dachuyuthuoro]] || [[word:dachuyujuoro|dachuyujuoro]] || [[word:dachuyushuoro|dachuyushuoro]] || [[word:dachuyukuoro|dachuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
